allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\(''''dependencies'''',{}\), **d.get\(''''devDependencies'''',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\) if any\(x in k for x in [''''expo'''',''''react-native'''',''''device'''',''''notification'''']\)]")
